description_long: This street light features a robust, dark wooden pole with a square cross-section, mounted on a wide, stable base. The pole is adorned with three illuminated, colored symbols in blue and magenta, adding a decorative and possibly functional element. At the top, the lamp head consists of two large, boxy lanterns with frosted glass or plastic diffusers, positioned on either side of a central metallic V-shaped accent. The lamp heads are encased in a metallic frame, giving the fixture a modern yet slightly rustic appearance. The overall design is geometric and symmetrical, with clean lines and a sturdy build. The materials and construction suggest durability for outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden street light with two boxy lantern heads, colored symbols on the pole, and metallic accents for a modern, geometric look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lantern heads, colored symbols, and the central metallic accent.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the pole and the depth of the lantern heads, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lantern heads and the colored symbols, with the metallic accent still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pole's thickness and the lantern heads' profile, similar to view 1.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Box-shaped lantern heads with frosted diffusers, encased in a metallic frame and featuring a central V-shaped metallic accent for a modern geometric style.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Colored illuminated symbols on the front face of the pole.
